introSection: This was a wooden roller coaster which operated at Wonderland City in Australia.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The Switchback Railway began operation on 24 May 1888.

On 1 December 1906, the park and the Switchback Railway were reopened as Wonderland City.

fullText:
This was a wooden roller coaster which operated at Wonderland City in Australia.

The Switchback Railway began operation on 24 May 1888.

On 1 December 1906, the park and the Switchback Railway were reopened as Wonderland City.
